research_basis.claim: dashboards should provide at-a-glance actionable information
scale, hierarchy, balance, contrast, and Gestalt principles support objective critique
research_basis.source: Nielsen Norman Group visual design principles

research_basis.claim: design systems provide guidelines, styles, and components for user-friendly interfaces
visual artifacts must address current accessibility criteria including dragging movement and target size

scope.html_activity_cartridge: HTML activities must load the 3_5_student_learning_activity profile and teacher_professional_presentation requirements
scope.mpp: visual artifact promotion must include visual_presentation_quality declaration and validator ALLOW before implementation/promotion handoff
scope.uss: visual_presentation is now a usefulness dimension required for html_activity, dashboard, teacher_tool, student_tool, landing_page, operator_tracker, and other visual artifact declarations

teacher_professional_requirement.intent: Artifacts should make the teacher look prepared, credible, organized, and professionally intentional to students, parents, teammates, and administrators.
